items.title: Claude 4 发布：Anthropic推出新一代AI模型
items.summary: Anthropic正式发布Claude 4系列模型，包括Claude 4 Opus和Claude 4 Sonnet。新模型在推理能力、代码生成和多模态理解方面均有显著提升。

items.title: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro开放API访问
items.summary: 谷歌宣布Gemini 2.5 Pro模型正式通过API向开发者开放。该模型支持200万token上下文窗口，在复杂推理任务上表现优异。

items.title: OpenAI发布GPT-4.5：更高效的推理架构
items.summary: OpenAI发布GPT-4.5模型，采用新的稀疏注意力机制，推理效率提升40%，同时保持与GPT-4相当的能力水平。

items.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
items.summary: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

items.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
items.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its platforms to grow and connect with customers, the company wants to do more in the space.

items.title: Meta turns to AI to make shopping easier on Instagram and Facebook
items.summary: Meta is using generative AI to provide more product and brand information to consumers when they're shopping in its apps.

items.title: With Sift Stack, two ex-SpaceX engineers are bringing the software that helped launch rockets to the factory floor
items.summary: Sift is building the data infrastructure for advanced manufacturing.

items.title: Lucid Bots raises $20M to keep up with demand for its window-washing drones
items.summary: Lucid Bots has seen demand accelerate over the last year for its window cleaning drones and power washing robots.

items.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
items.summary: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.

items.title: 中国AI音乐，悄悄把全球第一拿走了
items.summary: 还是人声、器乐双料第一

items.title: OpenAI’s Sora was the creepiest app on your phone — now it’s shutting down
items.summary: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.

items.title: WorkBuddy杀疯了？一群AI专家帮我打工，我在微信里当赛博虾工头！

items.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
items.summary: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

items.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
items.summary: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in safeguards.

items.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
items.summary: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

items.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
items.summary: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

items.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
items.summary: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

items.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
items.summary: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

items.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
items.summary: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.

items.title: OpenAI adds open source tools to help developers build for teen safety
items.summary: Rather than working from scratch to figure out how to make AI safer for teens, developers can use these policies to fortify what they build.

items.title: Talat’s AI meeting notes stay on your machine, not in the cloud
items.summary: The subscription-free AI meeting notes app is a local-first twist on notetaking tools like Granola.

items.title: Doss raises $55M for AI inventory management that plugs into ERP
items.summary: Doss's AI-powered inventory management system integrates with existing ERP systems. The Series B round was co-led by Madrona and Premji Invest.

items.title: Meet the former Apple designer building a new AI interface at Hark
items.summary: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."

items.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.
